intended_use: The EarliPoint System is indicated for use in specialized developmental disabilities centers as a tool to aid clinicians in the diagnosis and assessment of ASD patients ages 16 months through 30 month
intended_use_full: The EarliPoint System is indicated for use in specialized developmental disabilities centers as a tool to aid clinicians in the diagnosis and assessment of ASD patients ages 16 months through 30 months.
ground_truth: Expert clinician diagnosis (current best practice for ASD diagnosis)
other_metrics: For CertainDx population (n=335, clinician certainty >80%): sensitivity 78.0%, specificity 85.4%. For Uncertain Dx population (n=140, clinician certainty ≤80%): sensitivity 56.3%, specificity 68.1%. Repeatability 6.18%, Reproducibility 0%.
